questions.scenario: A Compute Engine worker needs durable local working space while rebuilding an index. Which service fits the block-storage shape?
questions.explanation: Persistent Disk is block storage attached to compute.

questions.scenario: A VM reboots and the app starts before the disk is mounted. What kind of operational issue is this?

options.text: Attached block storage needs mount and startup planning.

questions.explanation: A disk attached to compute must be mounted and ready for the process that uses it.

questions.scenario: Which Persistent Disk review details matter?

options.text: Which VM or workload uses it.
Whether it replaces the app database by default.

questions.explanation: Persistent Disk is tied to compute and recovery choices.
